title: Anthropic rents SpaceX?
summary: Anthropic partnered with SpaceX to access Colossus, a large GPU cluster. The commentator argues this reveals Anthropic's structural weakness in vertical integration compared to competitors, and contends that the real AI competition is shifting toward hardware, energy, and datacenter control rather than model benchmarks.
